subject: Q2 Budget Numbers
body:
Hey Alice,

Attached are the Q2 budget numbers you asked for. Revenue is tracking 12% above forecast and enterprise deals from March really moved the needle.

Key numbers:
- Projected Q2 revenue: $1.8M
- Marketing spend: $240K
- New headcount approved: 6 positions

Best,
Bob

subject: Benefits Enrollment Reminder
body:
Hi Alice,

This is a reminder that open enrollment for Q3 benefits closes on April 25. Please review your selections in the HR portal.

Thanks,
Acme HR Team
